info.name: Space Weather Dashboard
info.summary: Real-time space weather monitoring with NOAA, NASA, and HamQSL data
info.description:
Comprehensive dashboard for monitoring space weather conditions including: - Real-time KP index and geomagnetic storms - Solar flux (F10.7) measurements and trends - X-ray flux monitoring with NOAA alert levels - Aurora forecast predictions - HF band propagation conditions - D-RAP absorption maps - SDO solar imagery (multiple wavelengths) - Weather satellite image gallery
Data sources: - NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center (SWPC) - NASA Solar Dynamics Observatory (SDO) - HamQSL propagation data
info.author: Kevin Watkins
Kevin Watkins
